===
tags_usage
===
b=Test
a=Bool.True
a= boolean_operators(Bool.True, Bool.False)

---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (tag_expr
        (tag
          (identifier)))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (tag_expr
        (tag
          (module)
          (identifier)))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        args: (tag_expr
          (tag
            (module)
            (identifier)))
        args: (tag_expr
          (tag
            (module)
            (identifier)))))))

===
tag_pattern
===
a=
  match a {
  Test(hi) => hi
  }
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (match_expr
        (match)
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (tag_pattern
            (tag
              (identifier))
            args: (identifier_pattern
              (identifier)))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))))))
